title: Senior Teacher - TechSaksham South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - TechSaksham South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham South Asia Partners family as a Senior Teacher in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham South Asia Partners:
TechSaksham South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham South Asia Partners!
